sglang.title: Fix memory leak during abort
sglang.author: merrymercy
sglang.bodyExcerpt: TODO: add a unit test for abort.

sglang.title: Fix filter_batch function call
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The filter_batch function call in the code has been fixed to use the correct argument name keep_indices instead of sorted_indices. This ensures that the function is called correctly and the desired filtering behavior is achieved.

vllm.title: pass ignore_eos parameter to all benchmark_serving calls
vllm.author: gracehonv
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently ignore_eos parameter set by the user isn't passed into the profiler and actual benchmark run sections of benchmark_serving, but only in the first promopt run section. This means the output sequence length of different backends tested with benchmark_serving may be different,  since ignore_e

vllm.title: [Misc] Directly use compressed-tensors for checkpoint definitions
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Reuse existing implementations of compression and quantization configs defined by compressed-tensors by adding as a dependency
The reused classes are

CompressionFormat
QuantizationArgs
QuantizationStrategy
QuantizationType
ActivationOrdering

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build] Fix CUDA 11.8 Build
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Dont build 9.0a for scaled_mm_c2x since it's outside of cuda 12.0 guard and won't help perf that much that anyways.
The issue here was that for CUDA 11.8 if we were building for 9.0 we wouldn't build scaled_mm_c3x so we would instead try to build scaled_mm_c2x for all versions, i.e. "7.5;8.0;8.6;8.9

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Molmo text-only input bug fix
vllm.author: mrsalehi
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
[Bugfix] If the user queries text-only examples, molmo throws an AttributeError: 'NoneType' object has no attribute 'get' error, which is caused by this line: 
  
    
      vllm/vllm/model_executor/models/molmo.py
    
    
         Line 951
      in
      717a5f8

vllm.title: [Misc] Standardize RoPE handling for Qwen2-VL
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: huggingface/transformers#33401 has been fixed in Transformers v4.45.2, but the devs have clarified that M-ROPE is intended to be configured as rope_type="default". To avoid future compatibility issues, this PR updates the RoPE code in vLLM to follow their specification.

vllm.title: [Model] VLM2Vec, the first multimodal embedding model in vLLM
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Support VLM2Vec embedding model by TIGER-Lab.
This is a low-hanging fruit as the model architecture is exactly the same as Phi3V.
Future works, in order of priority:

Add CLI option to specify whether to use a model for generation or embedding so we don't have to hardcode the model name when the sam
